summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RancangBangun FASE 1 features. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI mostly functional with one minor overlay issue affecting chatbot accessibility.

ui_bugs.issue: Chatbot toggle button blocked by 'emergent-badge' overlay element preventing normal clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Can be clicked with force=True but affects user experience

passed_tests: RAB Pondasi calculation (Volume: 110 m³, Cost: Rp 93,500,000) - EXACT match
RAB Jalan Aspal calculation (Volume: 35 m³) - Correct formula
RAB 'Jadikan Proyek' functionality - Project creation working
Smart BOM Refresh Data - 5 materials loaded successfully
Smart BOM category filters (Semen: 1, Agregat: 2, Besi: 1, Cat: 1)
All sidebar navigation buttons (RAB Calc, Smart BOM, Search, Blueprints, Gantt, Site Control, FAT, Maintenance)
Chat API endpoints with keyword detection (RAB, BOM categories)
All CRUD operations for RAB calculations and projects
BOM materials API with category filtering
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chatbot overlay issue - remove or adjust z-index of 'emergent-badge' element that's blocking chatbot toggle button interactions

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - chatbot blocked by overlay)
